channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Deep pothole, 14th May
item.description:
Opposite entrance to construction site, just after turning to school.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous deep potholes, 14th May
item.description:
By the ongoing construction site. Impossible to avoid as the road is already narrowed by the construction. Please could they be fixed urgently as are dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on bend, 14th May
item.description:
Cars are constantly parking on this bend making it very difficult to see if any vehicles are coming in either direction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Westfield Avenue, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing traffic lights for cars at Brewery, 14th May
item.description:
I hope you are well! I’m getting in contact about the traffic lights outside the brewery. I’m not sure what’s going on whether it’s a timing issue with the lights that aren’t in sync or whether there is just a missing light at the crossing shown in the photo above but when driving down the road towards Tewksbury there are no traffic lights at this crossing for the driver so there is no way to know whether it is the pedestrians right of way or the driver’s right of way. Thanks so much and please could this be looked into when possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Margaret's Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Lights are red for no reason

item.title: Trees significantly overgrown, 14th May
item.description:
The three trees along this verge have become significantly overgrown, especially on the side overhanging the pavement. This has been gradually getting worse over the past years but recently has reached a point where the trees now frequently drop branches onto the pavement and road - most recently a branch about 2m long and about 2 inches wide fell onto the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Charlton Park Drive, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole, 14th May
item.description:
200 yds down from Upper Bottomley Farm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gambles Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement crumbling, 14th May
item.description:
Pavement outside our house is crumbling and loose tarmac is being deposited on our drive (34 Pilley Lane). Please could this be repaired? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Pilley Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Overhanging and need pollarding, 14th May
item.description:
These trees are on the land adjacent to the site of The old Farmers pub. Glos cc bought the field to build a new school. This hasn’t happened. The trees on the boundary to our estate (wendlescliffe) are hanging over and need cutting back. One (if it falls) could land on a private drive. The resident has flagged this to us.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Pastures Avenue, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road marking white lines or studs problem, 14th May
item.description:
Junction markings faded & require a refresh
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 14th May
item.description:
28DAY Vegetation Over-riding on Fw Approx 805m Intermittent Traffic lights TM (FW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on pavement outside 52 St Paul’s St North, 14th May
item.description:
3 black bin bags of rubbish, pizza boxes and a recycling box of rubbish on pavement outside This is a licensed HMO so the landlord should be making sure that their tenants have proper information and receptacles for disposing of rubbish and recycling, not just dumping their rubbish in the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Saint Pauls Street North, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on pavement outside 34 St Paul’s St North, 14th May
item.description:
Clothes airer and large purple suitcase Flytipped on pavement outside 34 St Paul’s St North

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Saint Pauls Street North, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on Church Lane, The Leigh, 14th May
item.description:
Potholes on Church Lane at the junction with A38. Difficult to drive on and potential to damage vehicles.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Lane, Leigh, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 14th May
item.description:
ENWD Please cut off 2x signposts pick up 1x sign and return back to nearest depot. Disc Cutter Required (metal blade) Give and take TM (Damaged Sign Post)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees) problem, 14th May
item.description:
Please pass onto the relevant local ahr representative regarding permanent repair of reinstating 2x damaged signposts Temporarily made safe on ENWD by returning back to depot.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Post or sign leaning slightly (less than 20 degrees)

item.title: Holes on road near metal drain cover, 14th May
item.description:
On Priory Lane, Bishops Cleeve, on the road from 2 Priory Lane, GL52 8JL Issue has been present for last month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Priory Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 14th May
item.description:
15DB 28DAY CW Pothole Approx 600x400x43mm Temporary Road Closure TM (CW10 Pothole)

item.description:
28DAY CW Pothole Approx 1000x400x60mm Traffic lights TM (CW10 Pothole)

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 14th May
